title: rhododendron zaleucum
intro: Rhododendron zaleucum, also known as the Zaleucus rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce fever and alleviate rheumatic pain, due to its high content of iridoid glycosides and terpenoids. Consuming the plant has been associated with several health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation, improvement of respiratory function, and enhancement of the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Rhododendron zaleucum is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, or it can be dried and used in herbal supplements.
